heroHeadline: BREAKING — IDF Strikes Damage Hospital in Tyre as Lebanon Ground Invasion Advances; Bushehr NPP Hit
heroSubtitle: Israeli airstrikes damaged a hospital in Tyre, southern Lebanon on April 4 as IDF ground operations escalate. Earlier, a projectile struck near Iran's Bushehr nuclear plant, killing one. A US fighter jet pilot has been rescued after being downed in the Iran theater.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-04. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post.
